title: Add canary metadata module
description: Create the deterministic ES module for FR-001, NFR-001, and NFR-002, preserving FR-002 and NFR-003 by avoiding changes to existing exports, scripts, dependencies, and runtime configuration. Estimated agent time: 30 minutes.
acceptance_criteria: `src/canary-metadata.js` exists and exports a named `canaryMetadata` function.
`canaryMetadata()` returns exactly `{ project: "monozukuri-soak-test", purpose: "v2-live-canary" }` with no extra fields.
The implementation is synchronous and contains no filesystem reads, network calls, environment reads, logging, dependencies, or async work.
`npm test` exits successfully after the change.
`package.json` and `src/index.js` remain unchanged by the implementation.
